content:
📢 We're Hiring | Legal Associate – Contracts | Healthcare & Pharmaceutical Sector

K&G Techlaw Partners is looking for a Legal Associate to join our growing team.

Position: Legal Associate
Experience: Minimum 2 years of Post-Qualification Experience (PQE)

Key Requirements:
✔ Strong experience in commercial contract drafting, review, and negotiation
✔ Exposure to the Healthcare, Pharmaceutical, or Life Sciences sector
✔ Understanding of regulatory compliance and corporate-commercial legal matters
✔ Excellent legal research, drafting, and communication skills

If you are passionate about corporate law and have experience advising clients in the healthcare and pharmaceutical industry, we'd love to hear from you.

📩 To apply, please send your CV to: saumyagupta@kngtechlaw.com

Know someone who would be a great fit? Feel free to tag them in the comments or share this opportunity with your network.

#Hiring #LegalJobs #LegalAssociate #CorporateLaw #CommercialContracts #HealthcareLaw #PharmaceuticalLaw #LifeSciences #LegalCareers #KNGTechlaw #NowHiring
comment: In healthcare/pharma contracts, negotiation speed is often less the issue than regulatory approvals and evolving compliance clauses like pharmacovigilance and data handling
